episodes.title: The Entire History of the Bronfman Dynasty: The Dark Money Behind America’s Sex-Slavery Cult
episodes.description:
For generations, the Bronfmans were one of North America's wealthiest and most influential families, building a fortune that reached into business, politics, and philanthropy. Yet behind the empire's polished image lay a shocking scandal that would link the family name to one of the most notorious cult cases of the modern era.

This is the rise of the Bronfman dynasty, the fortune that shaped a family legacy, and the dark controversy that forever changed how the world remembers their name.
